hooks.command:
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""')
case "$file" in
  */ansible/*.yml|*/ansible/*.yaml) ;;
  *) exit 0 ;;
esac
out=$(ansible-lint --profile=min "$file" 2>&1)
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  printf "ansible-lint (--profile=min) reported issues in %s:\n%s\n" "$file" "$out" >&2
  exit 2
fi
exit 0
